title: Bedwars x Bamboo
description: lots of bedwars, pvp textures,sounds and a beautyfull custom skybox
body:
Hi, this is my first texturepack and i want to share it. I put a lot of effort in it so thank you for your support. The pack contains multible sounds items, bocks, guis, that were changed.
Also i added custom hitboxes and block outlines. My pack was originaly designed to be bedwars only but now its cool for othergamemodes and pvp to. There will be an update soon where i will ad a sky. for now you can use an other custom sky. Thank you verry much and have fun.
